title: Pink Mode
description: Changes the default gui to be pink.
body:
Pink Mode changes the default GUI to be pink while keeping the vanilla style. (along with some subtle color changes)

---



### SOURCE

This pack is ONLY on Modrinth, anywhere else is not by me.

### COMPATIBILITY

Currently I'm focusing on adding mod compatibility for newer versions, but I do plan to add more for older versions. Please try to remember that I'm only one person, no one else is helping me with this project.

### MOD SUPPORT

The mods below are the only current mods supported:

| Mod            | 1.20-1.20.1               |  1.19-1.19.2             |  1.12-1.12.2             |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Biome Makeover           | ✅            | ❌           | ❌           |        
| BetterEnd        | ✅            | ❌           | ❌           |       
| Capes           | ✅            | ✅           | ❌           | 
| Easy Piglins           | ✅             | ❌           | ❌           |         
| Easy Villagers            | ✅            |      ✅        | ❌           |
| Easy Anvils          | ✅            |       ✅       | ❌           |
| Expanded Delight            | ✅            |      ✅        | ❌           |
| Farmer's Delight            | ✅               |       ✅       | ❌           |

| Inmis          | ✅             | ❌           | ❌           | 
| Inventory Sorter            | ✅               |       ✅       | ❌           | 
| Iron Chests | ✅  |  ✅| ❌           |
| Iron Shulker Box            | ✅            |      ❌        | ❌           |
| Item Filters         | ✅             | ❌           | ❌           | 
| JEI | ✅  |  ✅ | ❌           |
| JER | ✅  | ✅  |  ❌           |
| Lovely Snails | ✅  | ❌  | ❌           |

#### MORE
Please note that the original textures from these mods are NOT mine, I do not claim that they are. All I did was recolor them to be pink, I claim the recolors as mine, but NOT the original textures.

Please give suggestions on mods you want me to add compatibility for! It would help me greatly!

(2023-08-29)
I also noticed that someone else made a pink resource pack like this, I promise that I did not copy them. I only just now saw that they made a pink GUI resource pack after I spent a long time on making this ;(. If you want to check them out their user is ItsPinkuuu on Modrinth! <3

#### TERMS OF USE

You CAN use this in videos and streams, credit to this pack would be greatly appreciated if you do.

Do NOT upload this to any other site and/or claim this as your own.

Do NOT take and use the textures for your own project, or anything else that reuses the textures for your own purposes.
